description_long: This is a tall, flared ceramic vase with a wide mouth and a narrow waist, standing on a circular base. The surface is decorated with hand-painted, stylized botanical motifs in earthy tones of brown and orange, set against a creamy beige background. The rim of the vase is uneven, with a visible chip or notch, suggesting some age or wear. The painted designs feature abstract plant forms with oval leaves and dotted accents, bordered by wavy lines and vertical stalks. The finish appears matte and slightly rough, with visible brushstrokes and some discoloration, adding to its rustic charm. The overall form is elegant yet robust, suitable for display in a decorative urban setting.
description: A tall, flared ceramic vase with hand-painted botanical motifs in brown and orange on a beige background, featuring a chipped rim and a rustic matte finish.
description_view_0: This view highlights the largest painted plant motif with oval leaves and dotted details, as well as the chipped rim at the mouth.
description_view_1: This angle shows more of the vertical stalk motif and a secondary plant design, with the chip on the rim still visible but less prominent.
description_view_2: This view centers on the vertical stalk motif and the wavy border near the base, with less emphasis on the main plant design.
description_view_3: This side again features the prominent plant motif, but from a slightly different angle, showing more of the vase's curvature and the base's edge.
